name: lightning-memory
description: Decentralized agent memory for the Lightning economy. Store, query, and recall memories with Nostr identity and Lightning micropayments (L402). Agents remember transactions, vendor reputations, spending patterns, and decisions across sessions.
author: Jason Sosa

tools.name: memory_store
tools.description: Store a memory (transaction, vendor, preference, error, decision, or general).

tools.name: memory_query
tools.description: Search memories by relevance using full-text search with BM25 ranking.

tools.name: memory_list
tools.description: List memories filtered by type and time range.

tools.name: ln_vendor_reputation
tools.description: Check a vendor's reputation based on transaction history (success rate, avg spend, tags).

tools.name: ln_spending_summary
tools.description: Get spending breakdown by vendor and protocol for any time period.

tools.name: ln_anomaly_check
tools.description: Detect unusual payment amounts compared to historical patterns.

tools.name: memory_sync
tools.description: Push/pull memories to/from Nostr relays (requires sync extras).

tools.name: memory_export
tools.description: Export memories as portable signed NIP-78 Nostr events.

tools.name: ln_budget_status
tools.description: Check L402 gateway earnings and payment stats.
